---
title: Lift, Les archives de Roshar, Brandon Sanderson
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1780061347/lift_mmqgcz.png
description: Illustration du personnage de Lift, Les archives de Roshar, Brandon Sanderson
categories: [sanderson]
date: 2025-03-28
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1780061347/lift_mmqgcz.png)
